matchAny.description: API 요청 흐름, 트랜잭션 병목, Tempo trace drill-down을 한 화면에서 보는 대시보드

panels.description: 초당 API 요청 수를 domain 단위로 본다.

targets.expr: sum by (domain) (rate(tasteam_api_request_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[1m]))

panels.title: RPS by Domain

panels.description: 선택한 조건 기준 API 응답시간 P50/P95/P99. Exemplar를 켜서 이상치 시점에서 trace drill-down 진입이 가능하다.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])))

panels.title: API Latency Quantiles

panels.description: 5xx 비율. 위키 스펙대로 server_error 기준으로 계산한다.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(tasteam_api_request_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", outcome="server_error"}[1m])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(tasteam_api_request_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method"}[1m])) or vector(0)), 1)

panels.title: 5xx Error Rate

panels.description: URI/HTTP method 기준 평균 응답시간 상위 10개.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (uri, method) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001))

panels.title: Top 10 Avg API Latency

panels.description: 선택한 URI에서 메서드별 트랜잭션 P99. 병목 메서드를 빠르게 찾기 위한 핵심 패널.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])))

panels.title: Transaction P99 by Method

targets.expr: sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001)

panels.description: 평균 쿼리 수 상위 10개. N+1 의심 지점을 빠르게 찾는다.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_query_count_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_query_count_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001))

panels.title: Top 10 Avg Query Count

panels.description: readOnly=true 비율. write 트랜잭션과 read 트랜잭션의 구성을 본다.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(tasteam_transaction_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", outcome=~"$tx_outcome", read_only="true"}[1m])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(tasteam_transaction_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[1m])) or vector(0)), 1)

panels.title: ReadOnly Ratio

options.content:
### Tempo Drill-down Flow
1. `Transaction P99 by Method` 또는 `Trace Entry Point (P99)` 패널에서 이상치 시점의 exemplar를 클릭한다.
2. 팝업의 `traceId`를 눌러 Tempo로 이동한다.
3. Tempo waterfall에서 병목 span을 확인한다.

예상 흐름:
```
GET /api/v1/search
  └─ tasteam.tx search
       ├─ tasteam.tx findRestaurants
       └─ tasteam.tx findKeywords
```

Tempo Explore 검색 기준:
- Service Name: `tasteam-api`
- Span Name: `tasteam.tx <method_name>`

TraceQL 예시:
```traceql
{ span.method_name = "findRestaurants" && duration > 300ms }

{ resource.service.name = "tasteam-api" && span.uri = "/api/v1/search" && status = error }
```

panels.description: exemplar 클릭을 위한 진입 패널. 선택된 URI/메서드 기준 P99를 보여준다.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])))

panels.title: Trace Entry Point (P99)

matchAny.title: Tasteam - API Transaction Tracing

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])))

panels.description: 5xx 비율. 위키 스펙대로 server_error 기준으로 계산한다.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(tasteam_api_request_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", outcome="server_error"}[1m])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(tasteam_api_request_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method"}[1m])) or vector(0)), 1)

panels.title: 5xx Error Rate

panels.description: URI/HTTP method 기준 평균 응답시간 상위 10개.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (uri, method) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method) (rate(tasteam_api_request_duration_seconds_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", domain=~"$domain", method=~"$method", uri=~"$uri", outcome=~"$api_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001))

panels.title: Top 10 Avg API Latency

panels.description: 선택한 URI에서 메서드별 트랜잭션 P99. 병목 메서드를 빠르게 찾기 위한 핵심 패널.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])))

targets.expr: sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_query_count_sum{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_query_count_count{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])), 0.000001))

targets.expr: (sum(rate(tasteam_transaction_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", outcome=~"$tx_outcome", read_only="true"}[1m])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(tasteam_transaction_total{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[1m])) or vector(0)), 1)

panels.title: ReadOnly Ratio

1. `Transaction P99 by Method` 또는 `Trace Entry Point (P99)` 패널에서 이상치 시점의 exemplar를 클릭한다.
2. 팝업의 `traceId`를 눌러 Tempo로 이동한다.

예상 흐름:

  └─ tasteam.tx search
       ├─ tasteam.tx findRestaurants

- Span Name: `tasteam.tx <method_name>`

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, uri, method_name) (rate(tasteam_transaction_duration_seconds_bucket{job="spring", environment=~"$env", instance=~"$instance", uri=~"$uri", domain=~"$domain", method_name=~"$tx_method_name", read_only=~"$read_only", outcome=~"$tx_outcome"}[5m])))

title: Tasteam - API Transaction Tracing
